title: Honey Bunny in Bank Robbery
overview: Honey and Bunny In Bank Robbery is a slapstick fun riot. It is a story of 4 best friends who come together to help their neighbor, Mr. Khanna, to retain his job by solving a bank robbery and bringing the bad guys to justice.
